top_signals.title: US, Iran near deal to reopen Strait of Hormuz during ceasefire extension – Axios
top_signals.summary: The United States and Iran are nearing an agreement that would extend their current ceasefire by 60 days, reopen the Strait of Hormuz to commercial shipping, and allow Iran to resume unrestricted oil exports, Axios reported on Saturday, citing a U.S. official. Under the proposed arrangement, the Strait of Hormuz would remain open during the ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
